subcodes.first_line: We summon the servants unto God, their Lord and the Lord of all worlds. Lo, they have risen against My sacred dust and hasten [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ندع العباد الی الله ربهم و رب العالمین انهم قاموا علی ضری و یسرعون فی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @mystery of the great reversal, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
